name: openmetadata-env
description: Core credentials and runtime settings for the OpenMetadata server

properties.name: OPENMETADATA_ADMIN_USERNAME
properties.description: Username for the initial admin account created on first boot

properties.name: OPENMETADATA_ADMIN_PASSWORD
properties.description: Password for the initial admin account

properties.name: OPENMETADATA_DB_PASSWORD
properties.description: Password for the openmetadata_user MySQL account. Must match mysql.auth.password in Helm values.

properties.name: OPENMETADATA_JWT_TOKEN_EXPIRY_TIME
properties.description: Validity window for issued JWT tokens. Default: 604800 (7 days).
